articles.title: YAPU Solutions Launches MEbA Biodiversity Platform
articles.excerpt: YAPU Solutions has launched a new digital platform to help microfinance institutions measure and report on biodiversity-related risks and opportunities in their loan portfolios, in alignment with the Taskforce on Nature-related Financial Disclosures (TNFD) framework.

articles.title: New Partnership with Alliance for Financial Inclusion to Scale Green Microfinance
articles.excerpt: YAPU Solutions and the Alliance for Financial Inclusion (AFI) have announced a new collaboration to expand the reach of the MEbA framework, supporting microfinance institutions in integrating climate adaptation into their lending products.

articles.title: YAPU App Version 3.0: Offline-First Data Collection for Field Officers
articles.excerpt: We are proud to announce the release of YAPU App 3.0, featuring a fully offline-first architecture that allows field officers to collect client data, conduct risk assessments, and submit loan applications without internet connectivity.

articles.title: ECOMICRO Program Reaches 25 Microfinance Institutions Across Latin America
articles.excerpt: The ECOMICRO program, supported by IDB Lab, has now reached 25 participating microfinance institutions across 10 Latin American and Caribbean countries with YAPU Solutions as technology partner.

articles.title: Webinar: Climate Risk Assessment in Microfinance Portfolios
articles.excerpt: YAPU Solutions hosted a webinar on integrating climate risk assessment into microfinance portfolio management with over 200 participants from 35 countries discussing methodologies, tools, and case studies.

articles.title: YAPU Solutions Wins FinTech Innovation Award at Impact Finance Berlin
articles.excerpt: YAPU Solutions was recognized with the FinTech Innovation Award at the Impact Finance Berlin conference, celebrating outstanding contributions to sustainable finance technology in emerging markets.

articles.title: New Research: Digital Tools for Resilience Finance — A Practitioner Guide
articles.excerpt: YAPU Solutions has published a comprehensive practitioner guide on using digital tools for resilience finance covering data collection methodologies, climate vulnerability scoring, and social performance indicators.

articles.title: YAPU Solutions Expands Operations to Sub-Saharan Africa
articles.excerpt: Following the success of our programs in Latin America and Asia, YAPU Solutions is expanding its operations to Sub-Saharan Africa partnering with leading microfinance networks and development finance institutions.

articles.title: How YAPU's Social Performance Module Helps MFIs Measure Client Outcomes
articles.excerpt: YAPU's Social Performance Module enables microfinance institutions to systematically track client outcomes beyond repayment rates, measuring household income changes, food security, school enrollment, and other key indicators.

articles.title: Consulting Services: Supporting MFIs in CERISE+SPTF Social Audit Preparation
articles.excerpt: YAPU Solutions' consulting team has helped over 15 microfinance institutions prepare for CERISE+SPTF SPI4 social audits, reducing preparation time by up to 40% while improving data quality and audit outcomes.

articles.title: YAPU Solutions at the European Microfinance Week 2023
articles.excerpt: YAPU Solutions participated in the European Microfinance Week 2023 in Luxembourg, presenting our latest research on digital resilience finance and leading a workshop on climate risk integration.

articles.title: Case Study: Finrural Bolivia Uses YAPU Tools for Green Portfolio Management
articles.excerpt: Finrural Bolivia has successfully integrated YAPU's green finance tools into portfolio monitoring for its member institutions. This case study explores the implementation and lessons learned.

articles.title: New Feature: AI-Powered Credit Scoring for Agricultural Lending
articles.excerpt: YAPU Solutions has launched a new AI-powered credit scoring module for agricultural lending in emerging markets, incorporating satellite data, weather patterns, and behavioral data.

articles.title: YAPU Solutions and CGIAR Publish Joint Report on Climate-Smart Microfinance
articles.excerpt: YAPU Solutions and the CGIAR Research Program on Climate Change, Agriculture and Food Security (CCAFS) have jointly published a report synthesizing learnings from field work with MFIs across 12 countries.

articles.title: Training Program: Data-Driven Impact Measurement for MFI Staff
articles.excerpt: YAPU Solutions has launched an 8-module online training program for microfinance institution staff on data-driven impact measurement, available in English, Spanish, and French.

articles.title: YAPU App Now Available on iOS and Android
articles.excerpt: YAPU Solutions is pleased to announce that the YAPU App is now available on both iOS and Android platforms with full offline functionality for remote areas.

articles.title: Investor Services: New SDG Mapping Tool for Impact Investors
articles.excerpt: YAPU Solutions has released an SDG mapping tool that enables impact investors to align their portfolio companies' activities with the UN Sustainable Development Goals, with automated tagging and investor-ready reporting.

articles.title: YAPU Solutions Celebrates 10 Years of Digital Impact in Emerging Markets
articles.excerpt: YAPU Solutions marks its 10th anniversary with a decade of developing digital tools for sustainable finance in emerging markets, now serving over 80 financial institutions across 30 countries.
